name: TecBan Hackathon
quote: Winning the TecBan Hackathon with the BICOS Open Banking app proved that users don't need to understand Open Banking to benefit from it. A creative solution that stood out among all competitors.

name: Open Source Community
quote: Recognized as an Arctic Code Vault Contributor with 70+ published npm packages and 494+ stars on Awesome-Polybar. Contributing to Node.js and ElectronJS ecosystems.

name: DevOpsDays & DevFest
quote: Invited speaker at DevOpsDays Belem, Google DevFest, BrazilJS, and 15+ other tech conferences. Sharing knowledge on mobile development, DevOps, and security with the community.
